themes.theme: Broad USD weakness ahead of FOMC amid Fed leadership uncertainty and Iran diplomacy hopes
Stalled US-Iran nuclear talks lifting oil toward $100, pressuring oil-importing currencies (INR) and boosting commodity FX (AUD, CAD)
Critical central bank week (Fed, BoJ, BoE, ECB guidance) driving cross-currency repricing and positioning caution
JPY strength on safe-haven flows and BoJ policy expectations; EUR holding elevated levels above 1.17 despite soft German data

key_observation: The dollar is weakening even as risk sentiment stays cautious and oil surges, suggesting structural USD selling is outweighing traditional safe-haven demand — likely driven by Fed leadership uncertainty and eroding US exceptionalism narrative.
watch: FOMC decision and statement mid-week: markets need clarity on whether Fed caution translates to a dovish hold or hawkish pushback against rate cut pricing, with DXY 98.50 as the key technical pivot.
